tasks.title: Recipe Rip
tasks.description: iOS app scraping recipe URLs → structured JSON. $7 one-time purchase. Tech stack decision pending.
tasks.longDescription: Recipe Rip needs a complete rebuild. The existing React Native app has working UI but simulated extraction only. Rex's spec recommends Swift/SwiftUI with JSON-LD parsing, SQLite storage, and a 3-day trial → $7 unlock flow.
tasks.notes:
• Existing app is Expo/React Native
• Rex recommends Swift/SwiftUI version
• Need to decide: keep RN (faster) or rebuild (native)?
• Bobby to make final call
tasks.nextSteps:
1. Bobby decides: React Native vs Swift
2. If Swift: start native iOS build
3. If RN: add real parsing + SQLite to existing app
4. Design trial/unlock flow
